packages.name: playwright
packages.description: Playwright MCP server for browser automation — navigate pages, click elements, take screenshots, fill forms

packages.name: context-mode-mcp
packages.description: Context Mode MCP server — saves 98% context window via sandboxed code execution and FTS5/BM25 knowledge base; pair with context-mode-skills

packages.name: context-mode-skills
packages.description: Context Mode skill collection — ctx routing rules, ctx-doctor, ctx-stats, ctx-upgrade; install alongside context-mode-mcp

packages.name: github-mcp
packages.description: Official GitHub MCP server — manage repos, issues, PRs, code search, and GitHub Actions via GitHub REST and GraphQL APIs

packages.name: context7
packages.description: Context7 MCP server — fetch up-to-date library documentation directly into Claude Code context

packages.name: aws-mcp
packages.description: Official AWS MCP server — full access to 15,000+ AWS API operations across all services (S3, EC2, Lambda, CloudFormation, and more)

packages.name: azure-mcp
packages.description: Official Azure MCP server — 200+ tools across 40+ Azure services including Storage, Cosmos DB, Key Vault, and App Service

packages.name: gcloud-mcp
packages.description: Official Google Cloud MCP server — wraps gcloud CLI to manage GCP resources (Compute, GKE, Cloud Run, IAM, and more)

packages.name: azure-skills
packages.description: Official Microsoft Azure skills collection — installs all Azure skills (AI, compute, storage, compliance, cost, AKS, and more) from microsoft/azure-skills

packages.name: azure-devops-mcp
packages.description: Official Azure DevOps MCP server — manage pipelines, repos, work items, boards, and releases via Azure DevOps REST API
